commit.message:
8386344: runtime/StackGuardPages/TestStackGuardPages build failure after JDK-8303612

JDK-8303612 changes from `longjmp()`/`setjmp()` to
`siglongjmp()`/`sigsetjmp()`, but does not change the context type to
`sigjmp_buf`, causing an incompatible type warning when building the
TestStackGuardPages test.

This work is sponsored by The FreeBSD Foundation
